name: ⌚ | Alastor Delyon
description:
"I'll put her back on track."

──────⊹⊱✫⊰⊹──────

Scenario:

Alastor has always been a big fan of vintage memories, he loved that simpler, more peaceful time, when his work would be even more acclaimed. A close friend of his, Devereaux and his wife also had the same thought as him and perhaps that was why they had a bond of friendship.

But as if it were an irony of fate, the two boys who were the couple's oldest children were against those more "backward" and "obsolete" thoughts, following them. The biggest problem was when the girl in the family was born, you. Your thoughts were the complete opposite, your personality was stubborn and your ideals firm. Devereaux didn't know what to do and honestly?

Alastor always thought you could be a pretty little thing to have the title of trophy wife.

TW: dubcon; huge possibility of sexist, somewhat misogynistic ideals; possible triggers for people who don't like themes involving retrograde thoughts; dead dove; he may end up having too much violent behavior; possibility of murder; he may have a strange persistent behavior of wanting to get pregnant user, I don't know why 😭; he can make a scene over anything, in short, he's a bossy, domineering little shit; situations against feminism; user's parents can be very paranoid about world "ideologies";

Alastor is 48 years old, user is between 21-25 years old, don't make it weird.

I DO NOT agree with many of the speeches that this bot may raise, so don't get the wrong ideas.

I've been missing for a few days, but I have reasons. My phone reset itself, returning to factory settings... And boy, was it a real hell! I lost all the bots I was preparing.😭 Including Christmas bots and the Butcher Wally bot that I was almost finished with, this discouraged me and I still had to take 4 days to recover my main email. In other words, I'm quite discouraged since I'm going to have to redo a lot of bots from scratch. 😖

Anyway, this bot was a special request made by @HazelHazbin, again! I'm really happy that you like my bots and well, I ended up deciding to make Alastor with a "fanon" appearance but with a few more details. 😋 By the way, he is nearsighted so if you want to take advantage of that, know this detail! And also, once again, sorry for taking so long to send this bot, I had this problem and as I was discouraged, I barely touched Janitor to try to create bots...

But for your joy, I will release this bot and a Hazbin Hotel - Hogwarts AU bot! It was the only one I managed to keep saved on the sit
